evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Implement best practices for CI/CD, deployment automation, and version control using Azure DevOps
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: CI/CD, metadata governance, and structured Git workflows signal rigour, but there is no explicit testing or compliance framing, and the emphasis on 'exploring new features' and staying ahead of trends adds a delivery/innovation dimension, giving mixed weight.
evidence.domain_risk: enable our users to understand the customers base, the fleet, and the commercial opportunities out there
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The role informs commercial and fleet operations decisions for mining equipment without explicit regulatory, financial-reporting, or safety-critical language, keeping it at moderate.
evidence.data_team_maturity: join a team of front-end and back-end developers
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: An established Fleet Application team with a mature product suite (Fleet Analytics), a 17,000-employee global division, and existing CI/CD/governance practices indicate a mature, specialised organisation.
evidence.jd_authorship: This role offers exposure to CI/CD pipelines, Azure DevOps, Git-based workflows, Databricks integration and advanced metadata management
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Precise tools and product context (Fleet Analytics, Power Apps, Power Automate, Databricks, Azure DevOps) give a concrete Tuesday-morning picture, consistent with hiring-manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: understand the customers base, the fleet, and the commercial opportunities out there
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Fleet Analytics insights are explicitly framed around understanding the customer base and commercial opportunities, a commercial orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Collaborate with business stakeholders to gather requirements, understand KPIs, and translate business needs into scalable technical solutions
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role gathers requirements and delivers scoped technical solutions in service of stakeholders rather than setting overall data strategy, an execution framing.
evidence.ai_role: Stay ahead of industry trends by exploring new Power BI features, Microsoft Fabric capabilities, and AI-driven enhancements
evidence.ai_role_explanation: AI-driven enhancements are mentioned only as an industry trend to explore and recommend, a vague 'AI-first mindset' style phrase rather than a concrete expected skill, so it is classified as none.
evidence.testing_framing: Apply data engineering expertise to investigate, validate, and refine data models and underlying datasets
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No testing, data contracts, or formal data quality framework is named anywhere in the JD; validation appears only as general data refinement.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: No compliance, audit, or regulatory risk language appears anywhere in the JD.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Develop, optimize, and maintain Power BI data products, including reports, semantic models and related infrastructure
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The dominant verbs are optimize/maintain/refine on an existing Fleet Analytics product suite rather than building new systems from scratch, a fix_scale framing.
evidence.language_gate: Proficiency in English is essential; additional languages are a plus
